content.content:
pub enum AggregationMode {
    Count,
    Sum,
    Avg,
    Min,
    Max,
    Distinct,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct AggregationResult {
    pub group_key: String,
    pub count: usize,
    pub sum: Option<f64>,
    pub avg: Option<f64>,
    pub min: Option<f64>,
    pub max: Option<f64>,
    pub distinct_count: Option<usize>,
}
